title: Define Wave 38 manager provider handoff fit contract
description: Extend the architecture docs so manager handoff flows can expose additive provider fit preview, recommendation badges, and queue-aware selection/confirmation states without regressing current assignment behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Provider-candidates contract documents additive fit preview, status badge, and recommendation nodes for handoff flows
UI state map covers loading, empty, retry, recommended, and selection confirmation states in manager handoff
Module ownership clarifies backend-owned fit derivation versus mobile-owned selection and presentation state
